```python
from PIL import Image

def resize_image(input_image_path, output_image_path, target_size):
    with Image.open(input_image_path) as img:
        img = img.convert("RGB")
        img.thumbnail(target_size, Image.ANTIALIAS)
        
        # Create a new image with the target size and paste the resized image onto it
        new_img = Image.new("RGB", target_size, (255, 255, 255))
        img_width, img_height = img.size
        new_img.paste(img, ((target_size[0] - img_width) // 2, (target_size[1] - img_height) // 2))
        
        new_img.save(output_image_path)

def solve():
    # Example usage of the resize_image function
    resize_image("input_image.jpg", "output_image_1080x1920.jpg", (1080, 1920))
    resize_image("input_image.jpg", "output_image_1200x628.jpg", (1200, 628))
    resize_image("input_image.jpg", "output_image_face_centric_800x800.jpg", (800, 800))
    resize_image("input_image.jpg", "output_image_product_centric_1200x1200.jpg", (1200, 1200))
    resize_image("input_image.jpg", "output_image_small_1080x1920.jpg", (1080, 1920))
```
